text.title: code-decomposition-patterns Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for code-decomposition-patterns as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Leaky service: extracted service method accepts request/response/HttpContext parameters.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Framework types in service signatures tie the service to the HTTP layer, defeating testability. Services must accept only plain domain types.

failure-mode.description: Over-extraction: agent creates a micro-service for a 5-line helper with a single caller.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Unnecessary files increase cognitive overhead without adding testability or reusability. Apply a minimum threshold: a service/component must be >=40 lines or have >=3 callers to justify extraction.

failure-mode.description: Import update misses: agent moves a file but only updates the moved file, not its importers.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Broken imports cause runtime errors that only appear when the code path is exercised. Always run a grep pass on importers + `tsc --noEmit` or `python -c 'import app'` after each move.

failure-mode.description: Barrel re-export sprawl: agent adds `export *` in index.ts to make imports convenient after Extract Module.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: `export *` re-exports everything including internals, breaks tree-shaking, creates implicit public APIs, and causes circular dependency risks. Forbid `export *`; export named symbols only.

failure-mode.description: Settings circular import: env file (production.py) imports from base.py which imports from production.py.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Circular imports in config fail at import time with an inscrutable error. Enforce one-way load: __init__.py imports env file; env file imports base; base imports nothing from the settings package.

failure-mode.description: Doc drift: pattern application without updating the directory's AGENTS.md in the same PR.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: AGENTS.md file tables go stale immediately after a structural change. Always update AGENTS.md in the same commit as the decomposition.
